base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of stage_wily_4 — a tile (level_layout) from 1987 mega man. Wily Stage 4 — final confrontation. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Wily Stage 4 — final confrontation; Wily Machine 1 + saucer-beg sequence
